//: Configures the agent connector for the board UI (kanban-skill-ui). Every card button spawns this command in the repo root with the generated prompt appended as the final argument. Default is a plain `claude -p` (Claude Code subscription, no extra args, no env vars). Point `command` at a different agent to swap it. The prompt is always passed as a separate argv entry, never through a shell, so it needs no escaping. This lives in the project so it survives an `npx kanban-skill-ui` run, where the UI package itself sits in the npm cache.
